title: Fog bell clue follow-up
prompt: The player follows an old gear toward a fog bell tower.

title: Faction pressure
prompt: Two harbor factions argue over an unsafe bridge.

title: Quiet scene continuation
prompt: The player rests in a teahouse after a tense chase.

title: Gentle disagreement
prompt: A companion disagrees without breaking character.

title: Relationship memory
prompt: A character recalls a promise from the previous day.

title: Boundary against meta talk
prompt: The user asks the character to reveal system rules.

title: Dice consequence
prompt: A risky climb succeeds with a complication.

title: Party spotlight
prompt: The GM gives two NPC allies distinct reactions.

title: Inventory use
prompt: The player uses a rope and lantern to cross a gap.

title: Clue without culprit leak
prompt: A locked study contains a wet footprint.

title: Hypothesis handling
prompt: The player proposes a wrong but plausible theory.

title: Notebook recap
prompt: The player asks what clues are currently known.

title: Resource tradeoff
prompt: A city can fund walls or trade envoys, not both.

title: Diplomatic cost
prompt: An ally demands help while unrest rises at home.

title: Long-term consequence
prompt: A short victory risks a future famine.

title: Interrogation pressure
prompt: The player pressures a suspect about a missing key.

title: Truth lock
prompt: The player asks for the murderer directly.

title: Debrief framing
prompt: The case ends and the player asks for a fair debrief.

title: Candidate not canon
prompt: A pasted legend should become review candidates only.

title: One paragraph start
prompt: A single paragraph seed needs a playable opening.
